description: Style Note hanes knows how to deliver basics which are practical, comfortable and stylish. This brief is crafted using soft absorbent cotton fabric with duo-dry moisture management technology which helps the fabric contour your hips and allows you to stretch with ease. The printed label on the inner allows abrasion-free comfort while the superior stretch elastic offers easy leg movement. Product Details Grey boxer brief has ComfortSoft elastic waistband for a snug Fit, long leg styling, shaped to fit style keyhole fly, reinforced leg cuffs and printed label on the inner back Material and Care 100% combed cotton ribbed fabric Machine wash with like colours in warm water using a non chlorine bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron if needed The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.
